title: ipomoea umbellata
intro: Ipomoea umbellata, also known as the funnel vine or bell-shaped morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea umbellata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
